headline: Cboe Files Proposal with the SEC to Launch Near 24x5 U.S. Equities Trading
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, announced it submitted a proposal to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch near 24x5 U.S. equities trading on its Cboe EDGX Equities Exchange (EDGX). Cboe is preparing to launch in December 2026, pending regulatory approval of its filing, and contingent upon the readiness of required industry infrastructure providers.

headline: VERSES® Announces Closing of Private Placement Offering of Units
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, March 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE:VERS) (OTCQB:VRSSF) ("VERSES'' or the "Company”), a cognitive computing company specializing in next-generation intelligent software systems, is pleased to announce that it has closed a non-brokered private placement offering of 1,170,807 units (the “Units”) of the Company at a price of C$0.75 (US$0.55) per Unit (the “Offering”). headline: Did Cboe’s New Bitcoin Volatility Index and Prediction Contracts Just Shift Cboe Global Markets' (CBOE) Investment Narrative?
summary: Cboe Global Markets recently outlined plans for two new offerings: the Cboe IBIT Volatility Index (BITVX), applying its VIX methodology to bitcoin via options on the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF, and an innovative Mini S&P 500 prediction market contract with three-tiered payouts, both aimed at reshaping access to volatility and outcome-based trading. Together with fresh ETF listings on its exchange and calls for tighter oversight of competing prediction platforms, these launches highlight...
